attributes.description: Alerts when VM max disk latency exceeds 20 ms. VM-specific storage pressure.
attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] VM disk latency high

investigation_guide.blob:
## vSphere VM disk latency high

### What fired
`vcenter.vm.disk.latency.max > 20 ms`.

### Why it matters
VM-specific disk latency points at the particular VM's I/O profile, its VMDK placement, or a storage contention with other VMs on the same datastore.

### Triage
1. Inspect per-object latency.
2. Check datastore saturation.

### Remediation
- Storage vMotion to a less busy datastore.

### Tuning
- 20 ms threshold.
